title: Generate a concise eBay title for [Brand] [Product Type] within 80 characters including key features.
description: Write a detailed eBay description for [Brand] [Product Type] with short paragraphs and bullet points. Include key features and benefits like [Style Number].
instructions: Use the above Brand, Product Type, Style number searching for the product details to finish the ebay product listing as per the below request:

find the Mandatory and Optional product information listed below under 'Mandatory Fields' and 'Optional Fields'. Please ignore the Italian field names in the brackets and search only English Field names, But keep the same English (Italian) field name structure in your response.
if any fields have no information available on internet, or you cannot find it, leave it to be N/A.
The tone is professional and Minimalist style.
